root_causes: upstream reset before headers from billing-svc
connection refused while dialing upstream inventory-svc
prevention_steps: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for connection timeouts
Monitor and adjust resource allocation for containers
Verify service availability and implement circuit breakers
Review and update RBAC policies for proper access control
Implement health checks and load balancing for upstream services
immediate_actions: Investigate and resolve the connection timeout issue with user-service
Adjust resource allocation for the container to prevent OOMKill
Verify billing-svc availability and implement a retry mechanism
Review access logs and update RBAC policies as needed
Investigate and resolve the upstream service issue with inventory-svc
